'''favara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylometazoline|xylometazoline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylometazoline|xylometazoline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| favara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæværæth|fæværæth]] || [[word:fæværæj|fæværæj]] || [[word:fæværæsh|fæværæsh]] || [[word:fæværæ|fæværæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:favavarath|favavarath]] || [[word:favavaraj|favavaraj]] || [[word:favavarash|favavarash]] || [[word:favavara|favavara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:favarath|favarath]] || [[word:favaraj|favaraj]] || [[word:favarash|favarash]] || [[word:favara|favara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:favafrafth|favafrafth]] || [[word:favafrafj|favafrafj]] || [[word:favafrafsh|favafrafsh]] || [[word:favafraf|favafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favaratha|favaratha]] || [[word:favaraja|favaraja]] || [[word:favarasha|favarasha]] || [[word:favaraka|favaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favarath|favarath]] || [[word:favaraj|favaraj]] || [[word:favarash|favarash]] || [[word:favara|favara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favarathal|favarathal]] || [[word:favarajal|favarajal]] || [[word:favarashal|favarashal]] || [[word:favarakal|favarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favaraathatha|favaraathatha]] || [[word:favaraajaja|favaraajaja]] || [[word:favaraashasha|favaraashasha]] || [[word:favaraaka|favaraaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favarathan|favarathan]] || [[word:favarajan|favarajan]] || [[word:favarashan|favarashan]] || [[word:favarakan|favarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favarathaoro|favarathaoro]] || [[word:favarajaoro|favarajaoro]] || [[word:favarashaoro|favarashaoro]] || [[word:favarakaoro|favarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
